original_source_cohort.qualification: all four sd300b/sd300c PLAIN/ROLL self scores >= 40

required_note: The 500 base identities are exactly the identities used by the SourceAFIS joint-500 pilot.
They were originally selected from the SourceAFIS joint self-accepted cohort.
All four SIFT self conditions were rerun in full in this experiment.
SIFT filtering used only the new SIFT self decisions in the same dataset.
No failed SIFT identity was replaced.
No SourceAFIS score or decision was used to determine SIFT acceptance.

negative.pairing_rule: next surviving subject within the same canonical finger position, circular shift by one

self_cleaning.selection_basis: new SIFT self decisions in this dataset only

negative.pairing_rule: next surviving subject within the same canonical finger position, circular shift by one

self_cleaning.selection_basis: new SIFT self decisions in this dataset only

execution.actual_order_note: All four self runs completed and gated before B genuine, B negative, C genuine, and C negative, matching the SourceAFIS pilot actual order.

compared_fields: deterministic non-timing preparation and comparison diagnostics available under the source contract
comparison_policy.genuine: all survivor genuine pairs compared to primary SIFT plain_roll bundles
comparison_policy.negative: only exact dataset, canonical finger, path A and path B matches in every pre-existing SIFT result source with identical config and implementation hashes
comparison_policy.self: all PLAIN-self and ROLL-self pairs compared to primary SIFT bundles

runtime.python_version: 3.11.15 | packaged by conda-forge | (main, Jun 11 2026, 03:27:10) [MSC v.1944 64 bit (AMD64)]

sift_frozen_provenance.decision_rule: status == ok and raw_score >= dataset primary_threshold

adapter_declared_provenance.random_seed_policy: cv2.setRNGSeed(config.rng_seed) immediately before every geometry fit

implementation_hash_components.score_semantics: OpenCV SIFT L2 Lowe matches verified by PPI-normalized affine RANSAC; raw score is geometric_inlier_count with no acceptance thresholding in compare().

implementation_provenance.random_seed_policy: cv2.setRNGSeed(config.rng_seed) immediately before every geometry fit
